mapper.insert: INSERT INTO volume_plan (volume_id, novel_id, volume_number, volume_title, volume_theme, chapter_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{volumeId}, #{novelId}, #{volumeNumber}, #{volumeTitle}, #{volumeTheme}, #{chapterCount}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO volume_plan (volume_id, novel_id, volume_number, volume_title, volume_theme, chapter_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.volumeId}, #{item.novelId}, #{item.volumeNumber}, #{item.volumeTitle}, #{item.volumeTheme}, #{item.chapterCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE volume_plan SET volume_title = #{volumeTitle}, volume_theme = #{volumeTheme}, chapter_count = #{chapterCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE volume_id = #{volumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, volume_id, novel_id, volume_number, volume_title, volume_theme, chapter_count, create_time, update_time FROM volume_plan WHERE volume_id = #{volumeId}
SELECT id, volume_id, novel_id, volume_number, volume_title, volume_theme, chapter_count, create_time, update_time FROM volume_plan WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} ORDER BY volume_number ASC
SELECT id, volume_id, novel_id, volume_number, volume_title, volume_theme, chapter_count, create_time, update_time FROM volume_plan WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND volume_number = #{volumeNumber}
